notes: Post-Fed digestion continues: Warsh's hawkish debut spiked yields and pressured tech, VIX at 18.4 and day P&L -$8.8k. With a 2026 rate-hike risk now live and inflation at a 3-year high, I'm holding defensive until the yield/tech selloff stabilizes.
journal_entry: Holding 0.35 risk-off after end-of-day reassessment — tape still soft (day P&L -$8.8k, improved from -$15k but red), VIX 18.4. Avoids unchanged: parabolic MTEN/GPUS, AMC dilution, CLOV insider sales, AAPL extended, BFLY TD Cowen event tomorrow (Jun 18), AMD/ROKU/CRVO weak momentum. Watching whether yields ease and tech finds a floor before re-risking.
